milestones.week_1_target: Complete 7 hours of varied strength and cardio sessions, focusing on proper form.

milestones.week_2_target: Incorporate 7 hours of core-focused exercises, increasing challenge, and refine nutrition for optimal results.

general_advice: Consistency is key for both fitness and skill development. Don't be afraid to adjust intensity based on how your body feels, especially after intense sessions like football. Remember to celebrate small victories and stay hydrated throughout the day to support your body's recovery and performance.
